selectors: div[style="height:290px; clear: both; margin-top: 10px; margin-bottom: 20px; display: flex; justify-content: center; align-items: center;"]
span[style="color: #ccc; width: 100%; display: block; padding: 3px 0; font-size: 9px; font-family: 'Trebuchet MS', Arial; font-weight: normal; font-style: normal; text-align: center"]
.post__text > p + div[style^="position: relative; width: 100%; height: 0; padding-bottom:"]

{"selector":"#content-wrapper > div#content > div[id] + div[id] > div[id]:has(> div > div > div[style] > div.arrow-circle)","action":["style","visibility: hidden !important; min-height: 20px !important; height: 20px !important;"],"cssable":true}
div[itemprop="mainEntity"] > ul > li:has(> aside > a[style^="background-image: url(\"/upload/adv/banners/"])
div[itemprop="mainEntity"] > ul > li:not([data-test-small-card]):has(> aside > div[content*="Epicentr Ads"])
.headerPanel ~ table[width] > tbody > tr[style] > td:has(> center > noindex > div[id^="rontar_adplace"])
.main-table td[valign="top"] > div[class]:has(> div.c-topnews > center > table noindex > a[target="_blank"] > img)
main > nav ~ div.l-flex > div.l-col:has(> aside.c-aside__port div[data-picture-placeholder])
.main-row > div.row-cont > div.posts-layout > div[class="post-block posts-sidebar"]:has(> aside > div.banner)
article > div.no-padding > div[id^="share-page-"] + div[class] > div.clear + div[class^="col-xs-"][style]
.column--right > aside > div[class="title"][style="margin-top: 15px; margin-bottom: 20px; font-size: 26px; font-family: Georgia; text-transform: uppercase;"]
body > table > tbody > tr[valign="top"] > td:first-child > div[align="center"] > a > img
div[class="widget block block-block"] > p > img[style^="height:102px; width:2"]
.td-ss-main-content > div[style="margin-top: 40px;"] > div[style="float: right;"] > center > a > img
div[style="margin: 5px auto; width: 727px; height: 89px; overflow: hidden; position: relative;"]
